elements.text:
Not sure what to write? Here's an example:

Part 1:
I send an email message to a friend asking them to grab coffee, but they never respond. I wonder if they are mad at me.

Part 2:
Thinking back on the last time I got together with this friend, I remember they don't check email often and I feel ... relieved.

Notice that the statement, "I wonder if they are mad at me" creates uncertainty, but the final sentence resolves this in a non-threatening way.

Now it's your turn to try it out!
